preToolUse.command: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const path = require('node:path'); const rootResult = spawnSync('git', ['rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); const root = rootResult.stdout.trim(); if (!root) process.exit(rootResult.status ?? 1); const script = path.join(root, 'scripts/hooks/cursor-pre-validate-web-css.mjs'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [script], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
